entries.title: Doom / Ultimate Doom
entries.description: The full original Doom (or The Ultimate Doom with the fourth episode). Knee-Deep in the Dead, The Shores of Hell, Inferno.
entries.note: Import doom.wad (or doomu.wad) from your purchased copy.

entries.title: Doom II: Hell on Earth
entries.description: The 1994 sequel — 32 levels across Earth and Hell, introducing the super shotgun and the final boss.
entries.note: Import doom2.wad from your purchased copy.

entries.title: Final Doom: TNT Evilution
entries.description: TeamTNT's 32-level megawad, released commercially as half of Final Doom.
entries.note: Import tnt.wad from your purchased copy.

entries.title: Final Doom: The Plutonia Experiment
entries.description: The Casali brothers' notoriously hard 32-level half of Final Doom.
entries.note: Import plutonia.wad from your purchased copy.

entries.title: Heretic
entries.description: Raven Software's full dark-fantasy shooter — the registered five-episode version.
entries.note: Import heretic.wad from your purchased copy.

entries.title: Hexen: Beyond Heretic
entries.description: Raven's class-based fantasy sequel with hub-based levels and puzzles.
entries.note: Import hexen.wad from your purchased copy.

entries.title: Strife: Quest for the Sigil
entries.description: Rogue Entertainment's full RPG-shooter hybrid with dialogue, quests and multiple endings.
entries.note: Import strife1.wad from your purchased copy.
